message:
fix(witness): use t.TempDir() in resetAbandonedBead tests to avoid stale respawn state (gt-r8tf)

Tests used hardcoded /tmp/test which accumulated bead-respawn-counts.json
across runs. After 3+ runs, ShouldBlockRespawn returned true (count >= max),
causing the ResetsWhenWorkNotOnMain test to fail because resetAbandonedBead
hit the spawn-storm circuit breaker before reaching bd update --status=open.
